index.lede: The footing is poured and the door is hung — real login, real roles, all on ground you own.
index.creds_hint: Try demo / demo (admin) or sam / sam (staff).
dash.lede: You came through the door — Keycloak vouched for you, the app trusts the token, and none of it left the server.
dash.foot: Feedback becomes a ticket → the backlog → worked in QA, where closing demands a resolution. Tickets are the knowledge base.
common.tagline: Own your stack. Owe no one.
